entries.failureMode: Accepts domain outside [0,232]
entries.effect: Participant created with invalid domain; routing undefined
entries.detectionMethod: validate_domain() guards entry; unit test domain_out_of_range

entries.failureMode: Off-by-one error accepts domain 233 or rejects 232
entries.effect: Valid domain rejected or invalid domain accepted
entries.detectionMethod: Boundary tests for Domain(232) PASS and Domain(233) FAIL

entries.failureMode: writer_guid encoded incorrectly
entries.effect: Receiver cannot extract writer GUID for replay detection
entries.detectionMethod: Golden vector test sample_to_message_golden_vector

entries.failureMode: Payload bytes corrupted during clone
entries.effect: Subscriber receives wrong data — safety violation
entries.detectionMethod: payload_integrity_byte_for_byte test; safe Rust Vec::clone

entries.failureMode: GUID field missing in meta — returns error or all-zeros
entries.effect: Caller receives unexpected error or zero GUID
entries.detectionMethod: Requirement-traced unit test for from_message

entries.failureMode: GUID hex string wrong length — not caught
entries.effect: Corrupt writer_guid stored; replay detection fails
entries.detectionMethod: hex::decode returns Err on wrong length; validated in from_message

entries.failureMode: New Error variant added without adding as_relay branch
entries.effect: Variant maps to wrong sentinel; caller misinterprets error
entries.detectionMethod: Exhaustive match; compiler error if variant missing

entries.failureMode: AccessDenied maps to wrong sentinel (e.g. Timeout instead of NotConnected)
entries.effect: Authorization failure appears as network/transport error to caller
entries.detectionMethod: Unit test for AccessDenied → NotConnected mapping

entries.failureMode: Back-pressure policy not applied — queue grows unbounded
entries.effect: Memory exhaustion; system crash in safety-critical context
entries.detectionMethod: drop_newest_does_not_exceed_capacity test; explicit policy match

entries.failureMode: Sample delivered to closed/unsubscribed subscriber
entries.effect: Stale data delivered after subscriber lifecycle end
entries.detectionMethod: unsubscribed/closed guard at push() entry; unit tests

entries.failureMode: DropOldest removes wrong entry (e.g. newest instead of oldest)
entries.effect: Sample ordering violated; replay detection inconsistent
entries.detectionMethod: drop_oldest_makes_room test verifies b/c not a/b after overflow

entries.failureMode: close() does not notify waiters — recv() blocks forever
entries.effect: Subscriber stuck; task leak in safety-critical system
entries.detectionMethod: notify_waiters() called in close(); unsubscribe_closes_channel test

entries.failureMode: unsubscribe() sets flag but does not call close() — recv() blocks
entries.effect: §6.4 violation: recv() never returns None; deadlock-like symptom
entries.detectionMethod: unsubscribe() calls self.close(); regression test for §6.4

entries.failureMode: Race between pop() and closed check causes infinite loop
entries.effect: Task spins forever; CPU exhaustion
entries.detectionMethod: Notify registered before closed check; Notify semantics prevent miss

entries.failureMode: Second drain after close() returns stale sample out-of-order
entries.effect: Application processes samples in wrong order
entries.detectionMethod: Sequential drain design; queue is FIFO VecDeque

entries.failureMode: Accepts invalid domain and creates participant
entries.effect: Participant in illegal domain; routing undefined
entries.detectionMethod: validate_domain() at top of new(); unit test

entries.failureMode: Sample delivered to subscriber on different topic (routing bug)
entries.effect: Cross-topic contamination — safety integrity violation
entries.detectionMethod: HashMap exact-key match; topic_isolation_no_cross_delivery test

entries.failureMode: Closed subscriber retained in list and receives samples
entries.effect: Delivery to dead subscriber; resource leak
entries.detectionMethod: retain() removes closed subscribers before publish loop

entries.failureMode: Two participants on different domains subscribe to same broker
entries.effect: Cross-domain message leakage — ASIL-B violation
entries.detectionMethod: Each MockParticipant holds its own Arc<Broker>; domain_isolation test

entries.failureMode: write() succeeds after close() — no closed-flag check
entries.effect: Stale or unauthorized data published after publisher is closed
entries.detectionMethod: closed.load() check at top of write(); write_after_close test

entries.failureMode: Sequence number not incremented — duplicate seq numbers
entries.effect: Replay detection confused; safety analysis invalid
entries.detectionMethod: fetch_add(1) guaranteed atomic increment; sequence_numbers_monotonic test

entries.failureMode: Expired context not detected — write proceeds past deadline
entries.effect: Late data delivered, violating timing assumptions
entries.detectionMethod: ctx.done() checked at entry; write_ctx_timeout test

entries.failureMode: close() not idempotent — second call panics or corrupts state
entries.effect: Double-close from concurrent tasks causes undefined state
entries.detectionMethod: AtomicBool::compare_exchange ensures at-most-once; idempotent test

entries.failureMode: Publisher created after participant close — no error returned
entries.effect: Publisher works but participant is dead; samples may be lost
entries.detectionMethod: closed.load() checked before creation; post-close test

entries.failureMode: Subscriber created after participant close — no error returned
entries.effect: Subscriber channel open but participant is dead; recv() blocks forever
entries.detectionMethod: closed.load() checked before creation; closed_state_irreversible test

entries.failureMode: relay::Node::subscribe called without topic — no error
entries.effect: Forwarding task spawned with empty topic; all messages received
entries.detectionMethod: topic guard checks opts.topic is Some; subscribe_without_topic test

entries.failureMode: Back-pressure policy not forwarded to relay-level mpsc channel
entries.effect: relay adapter blocks caller even when DropNewest configured
entries.detectionMethod: policy captured before spawn; try_send for DropNewest/DropOldest

entries.failureMode: meta field is HashMap — non-deterministic iteration order
entries.effect: Byte-identical comparison of two Message values fails spuriously
entries.detectionMethod: BTreeMap used per §18.3; meta_ordering_is_deterministic test

entries.failureMode: Expired context returns false — write proceeds past deadline
entries.effect: Late data published after context deadline; timing violation
entries.detectionMethod: Instant comparison is monotonic; write_ctx_timeout test

entries.failureMode: Background context (no deadline) returns true — write blocked
entries.effect: All writes fail when using Context::background()
entries.detectionMethod: background() sets deadline to None; done() returns false for None

entries.failureMode: capacity clamped to 256 — caller requested larger queue silently truncated
entries.effect: Queue smaller than expected; premature back-pressure
entries.detectionMethod: min(capacity, 256) documented; boundary test for channel_depth

entries.failureMode: Returns stale payloads after reset() call
entries.effect: Test assertion uses stale data; incorrect test outcome
entries.detectionMethod: reset() replaces Arc<Mutex<Vec>> contents; written_payloads_log test

entries.failureMode: Returns None when sample is present (race with push)
entries.effect: Caller believes queue empty; sample silently lost
entries.detectionMethod: Mutex lock guarantees coherent pop; try_recv_non_blocking test

entries.failureMode: relay_spec_version field emitted (disallowed by §12.1)
entries.effect: relay conform --strict FAIL; §20.1.1 CI gate blocked
entries.detectionMethod: struct uses spec_version field only; relay-conform CI gate

entries.failureMode: Required field missing (e.g. optional_interfaces omitted)
entries.effect: §12.2 schema validation fails; relay-conform CI blocks PR
entries.detectionMethod: All §12.2 required fields present; relay-conform CI gate

entries.failureMode: ok field emitted instead of healthy (disallowed by §12.3)
entries.effect: §12.3 schema validation fails
entries.detectionMethod: struct uses healthy bool field; relay-conform CI gate

entries.failureMode: rustc not found at build time — RUSTC_VERSION is empty
entries.effect: runtime field in §12.1 JSON is empty string; conformance may degrade
entries.detectionMethod: unwrap_or_else provides fallback string; release-build CI gate

entries.failureMode: Cache delivers more than history_depth samples to late joiner
entries.effect: Subscriber overwhelmed with stale data; QoS contract violated
entries.detectionMethod: push_to_cache enforces history_depth limit; transient_local test

entries.failureMode: Deadlock: Broker Mutex held while SubInner Mutex acquired
entries.effect: System hangs; safety function cannot complete
entries.detectionMethod: Single-lock protocol: Broker lock released before SubInner.push called

entries.failureMode: meta key ordering non-deterministic between runs
entries.effect: Byte-identical message comparison fails; protocol conformance lost
entries.detectionMethod: BTreeMap guarantees sorted order; meta_ordering_is_deterministic test
